items.title: Sam Altman says the AI talent war is a bet that a ‘medium-sized handful of people’ will make superintelligence breakthroughs
items.description: "I'm not I'm not totally sure what's gonna happen, but it is a crazy intense comp for a very small number of people right now."

items.title: Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, and Meta Just Gave Nvidia Investors Great News
items.description: There's a lot of room for optimism as Nvidia is set to report earnings on Aug. 27.

items.title: Big Monthly Dividends From Big Tech: Forget JEPQ And Buy GPIQ Instead
items.description: Compare GPIQ and JEPQ covered call ETFs for high yields and Nasdaq-100 tech exposure. Learn why GPIQ stands out despite capped upside and risks.
